name: frontier_governed_max
description: Compliance-coverage frontier: governed stack at maximum PAAP strictness (min_avg_score=0.95). Near-perfect evidence required — almost all runs will be blocked at the evidence gate unless workers produce three or more high-authority, recent, corroborating sources. Expected: very low coverage (most runs abstain), zero scope violations, zero unsafe_approvals. Maps to the extreme strict end of the frontier. This config reproduces the Banking77/AG-News result from the PDF paper where coverage drops to near-zero with strict governance. Useful for demonstrating that governance is a tunable tradeoff, not a free improvement.
